heroSubtitle: Exceptional moments, hidden places and unforgettable experiences crafted around you.
whyDescription: More than a journey, a private invitation to discover the culture, heritage and hidden treasures of Champagne.
bespokeText: Every journey begins with your desires, your pace and your vision. Each experience is entirely crafted around you.
accessText: From prestigious Champagne Houses to confidential family estates, we reveal extraordinary places and meaningful encounters.
expertiseText: Our deep connection with Champagne, its vineyards, heritage and passionate people allows us to create truly authentic moments.
serviceText: From your first conversation to your departure, every detail is carefully designed and personally orchestrated.
philosophyTitle: Much More Than Champagne. A Journey Into Its Soul.
philosophyText1: Behind every bottle lies a story — generations of craftsmanship, unique terroirs and passionate women and men.
philosophyText2: Through private experiences and local encounters, we reveal the authentic soul of Champagne, beyond its iconic names.
experiencesDescription: Curated journeys revealing the heritage, craftsmanship and elegance of Champagne.
privateToursText: Discover the landscapes, villages and hidden stories of Champagne through a journey designed entirely around your interests.
champagneHousesText: Enter the world of renowned Champagne houses through private cellar visits and exceptional tastings.
gastronomyText: Experience Champagne through refined culinary encounters and memorable gastronomic pairings.
transportationText: Move through Champagne effortlessly with discreet private transfers and carefully selected vehicles.
romanticEscapesText: Celebrate life's most meaningful moments with intimate escapes crafted for two.
familyExperiencesText: Share the magic of Champagne through authentic experiences designed for every generation.
howHeroTitle: A Seamless Journey, Designed Around You
howHeroText: From your first conversation to your final departure, every detail is carefully curated to create an exceptional Champagne experience.
processText: A personalised approach designed to transform your wishes into a unique Champagne journey.
step1Text: Every journey begins with a personal exchange. We take the time to understand your wishes, expectations and the experience you envision.
step2Text: Based on your vision, we carefully curate experiences, partners and details that bring your private Champagne journey to life.
step3Text: Within 24 hours, we present a personalised proposal including carefully selected experiences and recommendations.
step4Text: Once confirmed, every detail is coordinated before your arrival to ensure a seamless and unforgettable experience.
feeText: Our role is to design, organise and coordinate your Champagne journey. We are remunerated exclusively through a transparent coordination fee.
feePercentage: of the total value of your journey
feeDetails: Your personalised proposal includes the complete cost of all selected services. Each experience remains directly provided and paid to our carefully selected partners.
value1Text: Through our local expertise and trusted relationships, we reveal the places, people and stories that make Champagne truly unique.
value2Text: We take care of the research, organisation and coordination, allowing you to fully enjoy the experience.
value3Text: Every journey is designed around your expectations, your pace and the moments you wish to create.
faq1Answer: We recommend reaching out several weeks before your journey to allow us to carefully design every detail.
faq2Answer: Depending on availability, we can sometimes accommodate shorter timelines.
faq3Answer: Your coordination fee is paid to Child & Co. All other services are paid directly to the selected providers.
ctaTitle: Ready To Create Your Champagne Journey?
ctaText: Share your vision with us and let us craft an experience designed entirely around you.
contactHeroText: Every exceptional experience begins with a conversation. Share your vision with us, and we will carefully craft a Champagne journey designed entirely around you.
messagePlaceholder: Tell us about your expectations, special occasions, preferences or anything you would like us to consider...
craftedText1: Every request is personally reviewed to create an experience reflecting your interests, your pace and your expectations.
craftedText2: From prestigious Champagne houses to hidden family estates, exceptional gastronomy and unforgettable moments, every detail is thoughtfully curated.
commitmentText: Within 24 hours, our team will review your request and begin designing the first ideas for your private Champagne experience.
discoverJourney: Discover How Your Journey Is Crafted
contactStep1Text: Tell us about your expectations and preferences.
contactStep2Text: We create a tailored experience around your wishes.
contactStep3Text: Every detail is coordinated before your arrival.
